metadata.note: This spec is locked at Phase 4 kickoff (2026-05-20). Any callable signature change requires CTO approval + re-test of all consuming E2E scenarios.
metadata.signature_validation: Use this to validate callable return types, error codes, and parameter schemas in integration tests.

integration_tests: Scenario 1: Portal auth → laudo review → sign
rtPortalLogin.notes: Token must validate against operatorId in LogicalSignature. Callable must not bypass RDC 978 Art. 167 audit trail.

listLaudosDraft.summary: Paginated list of laudos in draft state for RT review
listLaudosDraft.notes: Multi-tenant isolation: must filter by `labId`. No access to other labs' laudos even if RT email is shared.

fetchLaudoForReview.summary: Fetch full laudo document + signature context for RT review
fetchLaudoForReview.notes: auditaEventos is immutable append-only collection. Signature context must include all fields needed for Phase 6 PDF generation.

signLaudo.summary: RT signature submission for laudo review
integration_tests: Scenario 1: Portal auth → laudo review → sign
signLaudo.notes: Must trigger Phase 4-03 NOTIVISA queue for critical values. Callable writes to `laudos/{laudoId}/assinatura` (single doc, auto-create). State transition audit trail entry logged.

notivisaQueueProcessor.summary: Async job to process NOTIVISA outbox queue every 30s
notivisaQueueProcessor.trigger: Cloud Scheduler (cron: '*/30 * * * *' or manual trigger callable)

params.labId: string (optional — if null, process all labs)

notivisaQueueProcessor.notes: Must implement exponential backoff (3.1.0: fire → retry 30s later, retry 60s, 120s). Art. 6º §1 compliance: idempotency key prevents reprocessing. Audit trail logs success/failure per event.

setCriticalThreshold.summary: Configure critical value thresholds per analyte + escalation contacts
integration_tests: Scenario 3: Critical value → SMS/email + dashboard SLA
setCriticalThreshold.notes: Config is lab-wide, not operator-specific. Changes take effect immediately (no warmup). Phase 9 KPI dashboard must query this to validate SLA calculations.

escalateCriticalValue.summary: Trigger critical value escalation (SMS/email) + log SLA start
escalateCriticalValue.notes: RDC 978 Arts. 115–117 compliance: must log operator who triggered, timestamp, result reference. SMS/email delivery SLA target: <2min (measured, not mocked in integration test).

uploadIAStrip.summary: Upload immunology strip image for IA training dataset
integration_tests: Scenario 4: IA strip upload → Gemini Vision → model versioning
uploadIAStrip.notes: Gemini Vision API latency ~2–5s (acceptable for batch upload, not blocking on sync). Image metadata helps with multi-instrument labeling. Phase 5-04 routes image to v1.0 or v1.1 model based on experiment bucket.

annotateIAImage.summary: Operator annotation form for IA strip OCR validation
annotateIAImage.notes: Immutable: each annotation is a separate doc in `imuno-ias-dev/{imageId}/annotations/`. No updates, only create. Model versioning: v1.0 is read-only (baseline), v1.1 collects new annotations for next iteration.

returns.pdfUrl: string (GCS public URL or Firebase Storage signed URL)

integration_tests: Scenario 5: Liberação PDF → portal médico access → auditor portal
generateLaudoPDF.notes: CloudFunction memory 1GB, timeout 300s (puppeteer is heavy). QR embeds permalink to public verify endpoint (rate-limited by Phase 10). Phase 4 signature must be stable format (PDF callable depends on signature schema).

verifyLaudoQR.summary: Public endpoint to verify laudo via QR code link (no auth required)

laudo.pacienteNome: string (anonymized or full per LGPD config)

verifyLaudoQR.notes: Public, rate-limited (Phase 10 requirement: max 10 requests/IP/hour). QR token expires 90 days post-signature (configurable). LGPD: patient name shown only if patient consented to external QR sharing.

submitPatientFeedback.summary: Patient feedback submission (portal paciente) — NPS + comments

params.patientToken: string (opaque token from laudo QR or direct invite)
params.anonymousConsent: boolean (if true, feedback is anonimized after 90d)

integration_tests: Scenario 6: Portal paciente feedback → trending dashboard
submitPatientFeedback.notes: Portal paciente is external (no auth required, token-based). LGPD: consent checkbox required for non-anon submission. Phase 7-02 cron scrubs PII after 90d window (immutable audit trail remains).

createCAPAPlan.summary: Create CAPA plan for audit finding
createCAPAPlan.notes: State machine enum: pending → impl_in_progress → impl_complete → verify_passed → auditor_review → closed. Each state transition creates immutable audit trail entry.

verifyCAPAImplementation.summary: Mark CAPA plan as implementation-verified (engineer sign-off)
verifyCAPAImplementation.notes: Engineer owns Plans 01–04 (eng-only findings). CTO owns Plans 05–07 (process + audit). No state bypass allowed (must progress sequentially).

getKPIAggregates.summary: Query pre-computed KPI aggregates for dashboard
integration_tests: Scenario 3: Critical value → SMS/email + dashboard SLA
getKPIAggregates.notes: Must not query live collections; use pre-computed aggregate docs. Phase 9 cron job updates aggregates nightly (lag acceptable). Query SLA: <500ms (dashboard LCP requirement).

phase_10.name: Security Penetration Testing
phase_10.note: Phase 10 is external (consultant), generates findings report rather than callables. See v1.4-FINDINGS_REMEDIATION.md for findings tracking.

phase_11.name: Auditor Pre-Alignment (Weekly Meetings)
phase_11.note: Phase 11 is meetings + artifact review, not code callables. Artifacts reviewed: CAPA plans (Phase 8), portal UI (Phase 4), critical escalation SLAs (Phase 5), IA dataset (Phase 5), PDF/portal médico (Phase 6), portal paciente (Phase 7).

generateTestDataFixture.summary: Generate 1M+ test records across 50 labs for Phase 12 smoke test
integration_tests: Scenario 9: Multi-instrument data → Phase 12 Web Vitals baseline
generateTestDataFixture.notes: Test data must be multi-tenant isolated (each lab has unique labId). Fixture generator checks schema compatibility with all v1.4 callable signatures.

integration_validation_notes.schema_lock: Firestore schema is LOCKED from Phase 4 kickoff (2026-05-20). Any schema change requires CTO approval + re-test of affected E2E scenarios.
integration_validation_notes.callable_stability: All callable signatures in this doc are FROZEN as of Phase 3 completion (2026-05-07). Changes mid-execution require Phase 11 auditor approval + integration test re-run.
integration_validation_notes.testing_requirement: Every callable listed above must pass unit test + integration test before shipping to production. Integration tests run daily (continuous validation).
integration_validation_notes.error_codes_validation: All error codes listed must be returned as-is (no new error codes without Phase 11 auditor review).
integration_validation_notes.consuming_phases_check: Use 'consuming_phases' field to identify all downstream dependencies. If Phase X ships, all phases in 'consuming_phases' must be validated.
integration_validation_notes.daily_check: Integration Validator runs daily diff check: `git diff main -- functions/src/**/*Callable.ts` to catch any signature changes and escalate.
